targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE((SELECT SUM(cost_usd) FROM turns WHERE date(ts) = date('now')), 0) + COALESCE((SELECT SUM(cost_usd) FROM daily WHERE date = date('now')), 0) AS value
targets.queryText: SELECT COALESCE((SELECT SUM(cost_usd) FROM turns WHERE date(ts) = date('now')), 0) + COALESCE((SELECT SUM(cost_usd) FROM daily WHERE date = date('now')), 0) AS value

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE((SELECT SUM(turns) FROM turns WHERE date(ts) = date('now')), 0) + COALESCE((SELECT SUM(turns) FROM daily WHERE date = date('now')), 0) AS value
targets.queryText: SELECT COALESCE((SELECT SUM(turns) FROM turns WHERE date(ts) = date('now')), 0) + COALESCE((SELECT SUM(turns) FROM daily WHERE date = date('now')), 0) AS value

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE((SELECT SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_read_tokens + cache_creation_tokens) FROM turns WHERE date(ts) = date('now')), 0) + COALESCE((SELECT SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_read_tokens + cache_creation_tokens) FROM daily WHERE date = date('now')), 0) AS value
targets.queryText: SELECT COALESCE((SELECT SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_read_tokens + cache_creation_tokens) FROM turns WHERE date(ts) = date('now')), 0) + COALESCE((SELECT SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_read_tokens + cache_creation_tokens) FROM daily WHERE date = date('now')), 0) AS value

targets.rawQueryText: WITH t AS ( SELECT SUM(cost_usd) AS c, SUM(turns) AS n FROM turns WHERE date(ts) = date('now') UNION ALL SELECT SUM(cost_usd) AS c, SUM(turns) AS n FROM daily WHERE date = date('now')) SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(n) > 0 THEN SUM(c) * 1.0 / SUM(n) ELSE 0 END AS value FROM t
targets.queryText: WITH t AS ( SELECT SUM(cost_usd) AS c, SUM(turns) AS n FROM turns WHERE date(ts) = date('now') UNION ALL SELECT SUM(cost_usd) AS c, SUM(turns) AS n FROM daily WHERE date = date('now')) SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(n) > 0 THEN SUM(c) * 1.0 / SUM(n) ELSE 0 END AS value FROM t

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE((SELECT SUM(cost_usd) FROM turns WHERE date(ts) >= date('now', '-7 days')), 0) + COALESCE((SELECT SUM(cost_usd) FROM daily WHERE date >= date('now', '-7 days')), 0) AS value
targets.queryText: SELECT COALESCE((SELECT SUM(cost_usd) FROM turns WHERE date(ts) >= date('now', '-7 days')), 0) + COALESCE((SELECT SUM(cost_usd) FROM daily WHERE date >= date('now', '-7 days')), 0) AS value

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE((SELECT SUM(cost_usd) FROM turns WHERE date(ts) >= date('now', '-30 days')), 0) + COALESCE((SELECT SUM(cost_usd) FROM daily WHERE date >= date('now', '-30 days')), 0) AS value
targets.queryText: SELECT COALESCE((SELECT SUM(cost_usd) FROM turns WHERE date(ts) >= date('now', '-30 days')), 0) + COALESCE((SELECT SUM(cost_usd) FROM daily WHERE date >= date('now', '-30 days')), 0) AS value

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE((SELECT SUM(cost_usd) FROM turns WHERE date(ts) = date('now') AND channel = 'wa'), 0) + COALESCE((SELECT SUM(cost_usd) FROM daily WHERE date = date('now') AND channel = 'wa'), 0) AS value
targets.queryText: SELECT COALESCE((SELECT SUM(cost_usd) FROM turns WHERE date(ts) = date('now') AND channel = 'wa'), 0) + COALESCE((SELECT SUM(cost_usd) FROM daily WHERE date = date('now') AND channel = 'wa'), 0) AS value

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE((SELECT SUM(cost_usd) FROM turns WHERE date(ts) = date('now') AND channel = 'discord'), 0) + COALESCE((SELECT SUM(cost_usd) FROM daily WHERE date = date('now') AND channel = 'discord'), 0) AS value
targets.queryText: SELECT COALESCE((SELECT SUM(cost_usd) FROM turns WHERE date(ts) = date('now') AND channel = 'discord'), 0) + COALESCE((SELECT SUM(cost_usd) FROM daily WHERE date = date('now') AND channel = 'discord'), 0) AS value

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT datetime(ts) AS time, channel, cost_usd FROM turns WHERE datetime(ts) BETWEEN datetime($__from / 1000, 'unixepoch') AND datetime($__to / 1000, 'unixepoch') ORDER BY ts
targets.queryText: SELECT datetime(ts) AS time, channel, cost_usd FROM turns WHERE datetime(ts) BETWEEN datetime($__from / 1000, 'unixepoch') AND datetime($__to / 1000, 'unixepoch') ORDER BY ts

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT datetime(ts) AS time, cache_read_tokens, cache_creation_tokens, output_tokens, input_tokens FROM turns WHERE datetime(ts) BETWEEN datetime($__from / 1000, 'unixepoch') AND datetime($__to / 1000, 'unixepoch') ORDER BY ts
targets.queryText: SELECT datetime(ts) AS time, cache_read_tokens, cache_creation_tokens, output_tokens, input_tokens FROM turns WHERE datetime(ts) BETWEEN datetime($__from / 1000, 'unixepoch') AND datetime($__to / 1000, 'unixepoch') ORDER BY ts

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT datetime(ts, 'start of hour') AS time, channel, SUM(turns) AS turns FROM turns WHERE datetime(ts) BETWEEN datetime($__from / 1000, 'unixepoch') AND datetime($__to / 1000, 'unixepoch') GROUP BY datetime(ts, 'start of hour'), channel ORDER BY time
targets.queryText: SELECT datetime(ts, 'start of hour') AS time, channel, SUM(turns) AS turns FROM turns WHERE datetime(ts) BETWEEN datetime($__from / 1000, 'unixepoch') AND datetime($__to / 1000, 'unixepoch') GROUP BY datetime(ts, 'start of hour'), channel ORDER BY time

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT channel, peer, SUM(turns) AS turns, SUM(cost_usd) AS cost FROM ( SELECT channel, peer, turns, cost_usd FROM turns WHERE date(ts) >= date('now', '-7 days') UNION ALL SELECT channel, peer, turns, cost_usd FROM daily WHERE date >= date('now', '-7 days') ) GROUP BY channel, peer ORDER BY cost DESC LIMIT 15
targets.queryText: SELECT channel, peer, SUM(turns) AS turns, SUM(cost_usd) AS cost FROM ( SELECT channel, peer, turns, cost_usd FROM turns WHERE date(ts) >= date('now', '-7 days') UNION ALL SELECT channel, peer, turns, cost_usd FROM daily WHERE date >= date('now', '-7 days') ) GROUP BY channel, peer ORDER BY cost DESC LIMIT 15

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ts, channel, peer, turns, cost_usd, input_tokens, output_tokens, cache_read_tokens, cache_creation_tokens FROM turns ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 20
targets.queryText: SELECT ts, channel, peer, turns, cost_usd, input_tokens, output_tokens, cache_read_tokens, cache_creation_tokens FROM turns ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 20
